fields.label: Department Name
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sDepartmentName FROM tblDepartment ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Client
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 c.sClientName1 FROM tblDepartment d LEFT JOIN tblClient c ON c.lClientKey = d.lClientKey ORDER BY c.sClientName1

fields.label: Active
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CAST(ISNULL(bActive, 0) AS INT) FROM tblDepartment ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Ship Address 1
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sShipAddr1 FROM tblDepartment WHERE sShipAddr1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sDepartmentName
fields.notes: Column: sShipAddr1 (shipping address, used as primary address)

fields.label: City
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sShipCity FROM tblDepartment WHERE sShipCity IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: State
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sShipState FROM tblDepartment WHERE sShipState IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Zip
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sShipZip FROM tblDepartment WHERE sShipZip IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Contact First Name
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sContactFirst FROM tblDepartment WHERE sContactFirst IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Contact Last Name
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sContactLast FROM tblDepartment WHERE sContactLast IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Phone
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sContactPhoneVoice FROM tblDepartment WHERE sContactPhoneVoice IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Contact Email
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sContactEMail FROM tblDepartment WHERE sContactEMail IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Service Location
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sl.sServiceLocation FROM tblDepartment d LEFT JOIN tblServiceLocations sl ON sl.lServiceLocationKey = d.lServiceLocationKey ORDER BY d.sDepartmentName

fields.label: Sales Rep
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(sr.sRepFirst + ' ' + sr.sRepLast, '') FROM tblDepartment d LEFT JOIN tblSalesRep sr ON sr.lSalesRepKey = d.lSalesRepKey WHERE d.lSalesRepKey IS NOT NULL ORDER BY d.sDepartmentName
fields.notes: FK: lSalesRepKey -> tblSalesRep (dept-level override of client sales rep)

fields.label: Pricing Category
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 pc.sPricingDescription FROM tblDepartment d LEFT JOIN tblPricingCategory pc ON pc.lPricingCategoryKey = d.lPricingCategoryKey WHERE d.lPricingCategoryKey IS NOT NULL ORDER BY d.sDepartmentName

fields.label: Shipping Amount
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 dblShippingAmt FROM tblDepartment WHERE dblShippingAmt IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sDepartmentName
fields.notes: Column: dblShippingAmt — flat shipping charge for this department

fields.label: Open Repairs (count)
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblRepair r JOIN tblRepairStatuses rs ON rs.lRepairStatusID = r.lRepairStatusID WHERE r.lDepartmentKey = d.lDepartmentKey AND ISNULL(r.sRepairClosed,'N') != 'Y') FROM tblDepartment d ORDER BY d.sDepartmentName
fields.notes: Subquery count of open repairs for this department

fields.label: Scope Count
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tblScope s WHERE s.lDepartmentKey = d.lDepartmentKey) FROM tblDepartment d ORDER BY d.sDepartmentName
fields.notes: Count of scopes registered to this department

fields.label: Tax Exempt
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bTaxExempt, 0) FROM tblDepartment ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Pays by Credit Card
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bPaysByCreditCard, 0) FROM tblDepartment ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Onsite Service
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bOnsiteService, 0) FROM tblDepartment ORDER BY sDepartmentName
fields.notes: Column: bOnsiteService — flags dept as onsite-service eligible

fields.label: Tracking Number Required
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bTrackingNumberRequired, 0) FROM tblDepartment ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Show Consumption Report on Req
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bIncludeConsumptionReportWithReq, 0) FROM tblDepartment ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Enforce Scope Type Filtering
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bEnforceScopeTypeFiltering, 0) FROM tblDepartment ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Show Itemized Descriptions
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bDisplayItemDescription, 0) FROM tblDepartment ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Show UA or NWT
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(bDisplayUAorNWT, 0) FROM tblDepartment ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Billing Email
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 sBillEmail FROM tblDepartment WHERE sBillEmail IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sDepartmentName

fields.label: Mailing Address
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(sMailAddr1,'') + ', ' + ISNULL(sMailCity,'') + ', ' + ISNULL(sMailState,'') FROM tblDepartment WHERE sMailAddr1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY sDepartmentName
fields.notes: Columns: sMailAddr1, sMailCity, sMailState, sMailZip — separate from ship address
